<!-- GitHub PR Template -->

## Description
<!-- Brief summary of changes -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Link: Fixes #123 or Relates to #456 -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement

## Testing
<!-- Describe tests performed -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests performed
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Simulator test passed
- [ ] ONNX inference test passed

## Checklist
<!-- Verify these before submitting -->

- [ ] Code follows style guide (PEP 8, black)
- [ ] Changes don't break existing functionality
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No sensitive data committed (keys, paths, etc.)
- [ ] `.gitignore` updated (if needed)
- [ ] Linting passes (`flake8`, `pylint`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally

## Screenshots / Logs
<!-- If applicable, include screenshots or log excerpts -->
